title: McAfee Threat Event
description: A threat event represents a security detection from a McAfee product, including malware detections, intrusion attempts, policy violations, and behavioral anomalies reported by endpoints or network sensors.

threatName.description: Name of the detected threat (e.g., W32/Conficker.worm, Generic.dx)

threatActionTaken.description: Remediation action taken on the threat

detectedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the threat was detected

receivedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the event was received by the management server

sourceHostName.description: Hostname of the system where the threat was detected

sourceIPv4.description: IPv4 address of the source system

sourceIPv6.description: IPv6 address of the source system

sourceMac.description: MAC address of the source system

targetFileName.description: Full file path of the affected file

analyzerName.description: Name of the McAfee product that detected the threat (e.g., VirusScan Enterprise, Endpoint Security)

analyzerDATVersion.description: DAT (virus definition) version used during detection

analyzerEngineVersion.description: Scan engine version used during detection

userName.description: Name of the user logged in at the time of detection

processName.description: Name of the process associated with the threat

destinationHostName.description: Hostname of the destination (for network-based threats)

epoGroupPath.description: System Tree group path of the affected system in ePO

agentGuid.description: McAfee Agent GUID of the reporting system

FileHash.description: Cryptographic hash values for a file
